properties.name: public_arrival_rim
properties.note: bowl crest at the east|bend hinge; Petoskey Street east boundary ~51 ft further east across the upper plateau (street grade ~640-642, near-level connection) — real public arrival

properties.name: egress_rim_south

properties.name: park_arrival_west
properties.note: ON the rim_arrival_edge (site_context, non-schematic, ~618.6 ft) at its southwest end — the WEST park-edge low arrival. The floor sits ~6 ft below, approached through the gap between the stage-left shoulder and the south row-ends (the floor's only open low-side edge; the NW is correctly blocked by the treatment cell).
properties.source: scripts/rebuild_ada_routes.py — anchored to canonical zones / site_context rim_arrival_edge (read-only)
